productDisplayName: Classic Polo Men's Red Polo With Stripe T-shirt
description: CompositionRed polo neck t-shirt made of 100% eco-enriched cotton with dark red pin stripes, short sleeves, softly ribbed collar and cuff, fabric tape detailing on inseam of the neckline,  vented hem, short buttoned placket, embroidery at back neck and appliqued badge on the left chest with threadwork above itFittingSlimWash care Machine wash in 30 degrees with like colors Wash dark colors separately Use mild detergent Avoid beating and twisting Do not bleach Reshape garment in wet condition to its original form Do not tumble dry Turn inside out and dry in shade Polo neck t-shirts are a must-have in every man's wardrobe, for the simple reason that they are smart, classic and versatile. This red polo neck tee with dark red stripes from classic polo is classy, elegant and neat. Made of pure cotton, it is comfortable and will keep sweat at bay. Pair it with chinos or jeans, depending on the occasion.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in t-shirtsHeight-6', Shoulders-18"
